rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same three real, diff-grounded api-design defects (tautological curvature_gauge_transformation, vacuous oriented:True class field, and the redundant banach_steinhaus wrapper) and recommend the same fixes, so acting on either yields essentially the same improved PR; Review 2's extra out-of-scope/roadmap finding is mildly off-angle and rests on unverifiable roadmap claims, not enough to make its resulting PR better.
